abilities.effect: You and all your allies in a 30-foot emanation gain resistance 10 to spirit damage for 1 minute. You can instead choose to grant resistance to holy effects instead of spirit damage if the spell you cast had the holy trait, or resistance to unholy effects instead of spirit if your spell had the unholy trait.
abilities.name: Activate

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

abilities.trigger: Your last action was to cast a prepared divine spell granted by your deity

stat_block.text: Script in a language of the Outer Planes adorns this book's spine, and a deity's symbol is etched on its cover. *Books of warding prayers* are each devoted to a particular deity and are also a religious symbol of that deity.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.
